evidence: docs/tool_index.md still names emit_semantic_objects_from_cleaned_papers_v1.py as the authoritative Stage2 boundary while the maintained runbook and script surface point to run_stage2_composite_v1.py and llm_first_composite
why_at_risk: Operators can recover stale authority from a non-governance doc even when governance docs are correct.
recommended_discussion_or_fix: Update or explicitly de-authorize the stale tool-index statement.

evidence: Summary mode and summary-first-column enhancement exist in maintained code and governed runs but are absent from project/feature_units/feature_unit_registry.json and current observer logic
why_at_risk: These features can be active or bypassed without appearing in expected-vs-actual feature activation reports.
recommended_discussion_or_fix: Add feature-unit entries and deterministic observers for summary mode and summary-first-column enhancement.

evidence: Qlyk Stage2-only runs 12 and 17 mark variant_aware_gt_authority_switch as required and missing even though no compare artifact exists
why_at_risk: Stage2-only diagnostic runs get misleading fail gates that are unrelated to the actual task.
recommended_discussion_or_fix: Restrict compare-only required features to compare runs or add run-type-aware gating.

evidence: Replay child run 17 rebuilds completed Stage2 artifacts but does not emit a replay-local stage2_prompt_preview_v1.tsv
why_at_risk: Debuggers can inspect a replay child and falsely think no prompt-preview evidence exists.
recommended_discussion_or_fix: Record parent-live prompt preview path explicitly in replay RUN_CONTEXT or feature reports.

evidence: Legacy docs describe implemented table-first and synthesis-first packing in the deprecated wide-row extractor, but the maintained composite Stage2 default is raw_prefix_then_table_excerpts
why_at_risk: Teams can believe input packing was already solved in current Stage2 when it was solved only in historical code.
recommended_discussion_or_fix: Keep historical packing features in the registry as historical_reference and explicitly compare them to the maintained path.

evidence: Recent QLYK audit showed literal-binding failure is upstream evidence-locality breakage, but no maintained locality-preserving contract has been adopted yet
why_at_risk: This is a newly surfaced design-intent candidate that could be forgotten again because it is not implemented or governed.
recommended_discussion_or_fix: Discuss whether to promote it into maintained input-packing governance or leave it as a tracked unresolved design candidate.
